title: Public Notice on Assignment of Frequencies to Fixed Wireless Access Systems in the 28 GHz Band
summary: Provides spectrum assignment treatment for fixed wireless access systems in the 28 GHz band, relevant to high-capacity wireless broadband deployment and spectrum compliance.

theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.spectrum: Public notice assigning 28 GHz spectrum for fixed wireless access.

notes: Instrument type recorded as uncertain in the source (decision?). Related instruments: Related to National Frequency Plan and fixed wireless access spectrum policy
